headline: Airline Stocks Extend Losses as Carriers Weigh Disruptions, Higher Fuel Costs
summary: Shares in American Airlines, Delta Air Lines and United Airlines all fell in premarket trading.  European carriers, including Air France-KLM, British Airways owner IAG and Deutsche Lufthansa dropped.  El Al Israel Airlines dropped nearly 5% in Tel Aviv.

raw.headline: Airline Stocks Extend Losses as Carriers Weigh Disruptions, Higher Fuel Costs

headline: Will United’s MileagePlus Push Into Canadian Cards Offset Fuel-Cost Pressures For UAL’s Investors?
summary: In late February 2026, Neo Financial and United Airlines announced a co-branded United MileagePlus Neo World Elite Mastercard for Canadians, offering travel perks like priority boarding, a free checked bag and accelerated rewards on everyday spending and flights across United and Star Alliance networks. This partnership expands United’s MileagePlus ecosystem into the Canadian credit card market, potentially deepening customer loyalty by linking daily purchases to international travel...

headline: Iran, Dip-Buyers & a Rare Buffett Stumble: Wall Street Shakes Off Its Worst Fears
summary: U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran rattled markets at the open, but seasoned dip-buyers pushed the major indices back to near-flat by the close. Meanwhile, Berkshire Hathaway's post-Buffett era gets off to a rocky start, and energy and defense stocks surge.
